blocks.title: Reading — The Google Translators in Human Form
paragraphs: Michael Erard's article is about hyperglots — people who can speak many languages.
The article discusses Giuseppe Mezzofanti and modern language learners.
The main question is whether hyperglots are born with special abilities or become successful through hard work and practice.

blocks.title: Exercise 8 — Find these words in the article
Exercise 9 — Complete the sentences
items: There is evidence that he could use many languages.
There will be growing opportunities in the future.
Top performers may have genes that allow them to get the most from their training.
They often have limited terms for individual languages.
They find opportunities to use language closer to home.

blocks.title: Workbook Unit 1 — Vocabulary: Talking about people
items: Vocabulary: Arabic, engineer, office, Poland, lawyer, cook, an only child, separate.
